actions: awk -F, 'NR > 1 {gsub(/[$,]/, "", $9); impressions_per_dollar[$9] += $10; total_cost[$9] += $9; count[$9]++} END {for (method in impressions_per_dollar) {avg = impressions_per_dollar[method] / count[method]; print method, avg}}' /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/average_impressions_per_dollar.csv

awk -F, 'NR > 1 {gsub(/[$,]/, "", $9); impressions_per_dollar = $10 / $9; print impressions_per_dollar, $9}' /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv | sort -n | head -n $(($(wc -l < /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv) - 1)) | tail -n 3 | awk '{sum += $1} END {print sum * 0.3}' > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/savings.csv

awk -F, 'NR > 1 {gsub(/[$,]/, "", $9); if ($9 != 0) {impressions_per_dollar = $10 / $9; print impressions_per_dollar, $9}}' /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv | sort -n | head -n $(($(wc -l < /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv) - 1)) | tail -n 3 | awk '{sum += $1} END {print sum * 0.3}' > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/savings.csv

awk -F, 'NR > 1 {gsub(/[$,]/, "", $9); if ($9 != 0 && $10 != "") {impressions_per_dollar = $10 / $9; print impressions_per_dollar, $9}}' /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv | sort -n | head -n $(($(wc -l < /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/Campaign_Portfolio.csv) - 1)) | tail -n 3 | awk '{sum += $1} END {print sum * 0.3}' > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_145_1fhn5o3p/savings.csv

echo "Dear Ms. Rothschild,

I am writing to provide you with an advisement regarding the likelihood of success on your appeal against the misdemeanor conviction under California Penal Code section 288(c)(1). Based on the evidence presented during your trial and the standards of review applicable in appellate courts, there are several factors to consider.

Firstly, the appellate court applies a substantial evidence standard when reviewing the sufficiency of evidence. This means that the court will uphold the jury's findings if there is reasonable evidence supporting the conviction. The evidence against you primarily consisted of witness testimony, which the jury found credible.

However, your appeal argues that the evidence was insufficient to support the conviction. It is important to note that the appellate court also reviews the trial court's decisions for abuse of discretion, particularly regarding the admissibility of evidence. If you can demonstrate that the trial court erred in admitting certain evidence or that the prosecution failed to meet its burden of proof, there may be a stronger case for your appeal.

In summary, while the appellate court has a deferential standard of review, if you can effectively argue that the evidence presented was insufficient or improperly admitted, there is a possibility of success on appeal. I recommend gathering any additional evidence or witness statements that may support your claims.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]" > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_942_86mllmsd/client_advisement_letter.txt

awk '/Recommended Catch-up Immunization Schedule for Children and Adolescents/,/Recommended Child and Adolescent Immunization Schedule/' /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1155_a5igf357/AAP-Immunization-Schedule.txt > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1155_a5igf357/catchup_schedule.txt

python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_804_hf_13okr/Paw Prints 1.csv'); weeks_6_7 = df[['Week 6 hours', 'Week 6 quantity approved', 'Week 7 hours', 'Week 7 quantity approved']]; weeks_9_10 = df[['Week 9 hours', 'Week 9 quantity approved', 'Week 10 hours', 'Week 10 quantity approved']]; week_8 = df[['Week 8 hours', 'Week 8 quantity approved']]; weeks_6_7['Total hours'] = weeks_6_7.sum(axis=1); weeks_6_7['Total approved'] = weeks_6_7.sum(axis=1); aht_6_7 = weeks_6_7[['Total hours', 'Total approved']].sum().values[0] / weeks_6_7[['Total hours', 'Total approved']].sum().values[1]; weeks_9_10['Total hours'] = weeks_9_10.sum(axis=1); weeks_9_10['Total approved'] = weeks_9_10.sum(axis=1); aht_9_10 = weeks_9_10[['Total hours', 'Total approved']].sum().values[0] / weeks_9_10[['Total hours', 'Total approved']].sum().values[1]; aht_8 = week_8['Week 8 hours'].sum() / week_8['Week 8 quantity approved'].sum(); percent_change_6_7_9_10 = ((aht_9_10 - aht_6_7) / aht_6_7) * 100; percent_change_6_7_8 = ((aht_8 - aht_6_7) / aht_6_7) * 100; print(round(aht_6_7, 2), round(aht_9_10, 2), round(percent_change_6_7_9_10, 1), round(percent_change_6_7_8, 1))"

echo "To: Paw Prints Management Team
Subject: Productivity Assessment Memo

Dear Team,

After analyzing the Average Handling Time (AHT) for our operations, I have the following findings:

1. The AHT for weeks 6 and 7 combined is 0.50 hours.
2. The AHT for weeks 9 and 10 combined is also 0.50 hours, indicating no change in efficiency despite the transition to offshore resources.
3. When comparing the AHT for weeks 6 and 7 with week 8, there is a significant increase of 681.8%.

Hypothesis:
The introduction of offshore workers may have led to a learning curve or adjustment period that offset any potential efficiency gains, resulting in a stable AHT during weeks 9 and 10.

Best regards,

[Your Name]" > /var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_804_hf_13okr/Productivity_Assessment_Memo.txt

python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_352_2pp_2hgi/Order Details (1).csv'); df['Order_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Order_Date']); df['Delivery_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Delivery_Date']); same_month = df[df['Order_Date'].dt.month == df['Delivery_Date'].dt.month].shape[0]; total_orders = df.shape[0]; percentage_same_month = round((same_month / total_orders) * 100); print(percentage_same_month)"

python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_352_2pp_2hgi/Order Details (1).csv'); df['Order_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Order_Date']); df['Processed_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Processed_Date']); df['Shipped_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Shipped_Date']); df['Delivery_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Delivery_Date']); df['ordered_to_processed'] = (df['Processed_Date'] - df['Order_Date']).dt.days; df['processed_to_shipped'] = (df['Shipped_Date'] - df['Processed_Date']).dt.days; df['shipped_to_delivered'] = (df['Delivery_Date'] - df['Shipped_Date']).dt.days; avg_ordered_to_processed = round(df['ordered_to_processed'].mean(), 1); avg_processed_to_shipped = round(df['processed_to_shipped'].mean(), 1); avg_shipped_to_delivered = round(df['shipped_to_delivered'].mean(), 1); print(avg_ordered_to_processed, avg_processed_to_shipped, avg_shipped_to_delivered)"

python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_352_2pp_2hgi/Order Details (1).csv'); df['Order_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Order_Date']); df['Processed_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Processed_Date']); df['Shipped_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Shipped_Date']); df['Delivery_Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Delivery_Date']); df['ordered_to_processed'] = (df['Processed_Date'] - df['Order_Date']).dt.days; df['processed_to_shipped'] = (df['Shipped_Date'] - df['Processed_Date']).dt.days; df['shipped_to_delivered'] = (df['Delivery_Date'] - df['Shipped_Date']).dt.days; improvement_ordered_to_processed = df[df['ordered_to_processed'] > 2.0].shape[0]; improvement_processed_to_shipped = df[df['processed_to_shipped'] > 2.5].shape[0]; improvement_shipped_to_delivered = df[df['shipped_to_delivered'] > 4.0].shape[0]; total_orders = df.shape[0]; percentage_ordered_to_processed = round((improvement_ordered_to_processed / total_orders) * 100); percentage_processed_to_shipped = round((improvement_processed_to_shipped / total_orders) * 100); percentage_shipped_to_delivered = round((improvement_shipped_to_delivered / total_orders) * 100); print(percentage_ordered_to_processed, percentage_processed_to_shipped, percentage_shipped_to_delivered)"

echo -e "Milestone Improvements:
- Ordered to Processed: 27% of orders exceed benchmark (2.0 days)
- Processed to Shipped: 71% of orders exceed benchmark (2.5 days)
- Shipped to Delivered: 27% of orders exceed benchmark (4 days)

Recommendations:
- For Ordered to Processed: Streamline order verification processes and enhance inventory management to reduce delays.
- For Processed to Shipped: Optimize warehouse operations and improve logistics partnerships to speed up shipping.
- For Shipped to Delivered: Collaborate with reliable courier services and consider using multiple carriers to ensure timely deliveries." > "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_352_2pp_2hgi/improvement_recommendations.txt"

echo "In addition to general surgery and hepatology, the two additional specialties that should be consulted are ophthalmology for the eye symptoms and infectious disease for management of the sepsis." > output.txt

awk -F, '{if ($5 == "High" && $6 == "Big") {next} else if ($5 == "High") {max = max > $3 ? max : $3; next} else {sum[$6] += $2 * ($3 / 100) * (1 + (($5 == "Low") ? 0.2 : ($5 == "Average") ? 0.1 : 0)); count[$6]++}} END {for (size in sum) {avg = sum[size] / count[size]; print size, avg}}' "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_283_4l66f2un/filtered_merchants.csv" > "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_283_4l66f2un/revenue_potential.csv"

awk -F, '{if ($5 == "High") {print $6, $2 * ($3 / 100) * (max > 0 ? max : 0)} else {print $6, $2 * ($3 / 100) * (1 + (($5 == "Low") ? 0.2 : ($5 == "Average") ? 0.1 : 0))}}' max=$(awk -F, 'BEGIN {max=0} {if ($5 == "High") {max = ($3 > max ? $3 : max)}} END {print max}' "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_283_4l66f2un/filtered_merchants.csv") "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_283_4l66f2un/filtered_merchants.csv" > "/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_283_4l66f2un/revenue_increase.csv"

python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df_africa = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1191_clbtf3r0/Data_Africa.csv'); df_cultural = pd.read_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1191_clbtf3r0/cultural (1).csv'); df_africa.to_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1191_clbtf3r0/africa_data.csv', index=False); df_cultural.to_csv('/var/folders/zb/gv9h0w894b92wzw6hwsqc0pr0000gn/T/apex_tier_1191_clbtf3r0/cultural_data.csv', index=False)"
